title: JujutsuEdit
description: A client sided mod to move around overlay elements of Orca's Jujutsucraft Mod.
body:
# JujutsuEdit

JujutsuEdit is a client sided mod that allows you to move around overlay elements of Orca's Jujutsucraft Mod

Default key is the **HOME** button press it then drag around the overlay elements\
**Right Click** elements to disable them\
Use **Scroll Wheel** to inflate or deflate elements
